title: Compliance: BLE GATT queue (rust/lichen-meshtastic/src/gatt.rs)
description: Policy: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md sections 1,2,4,5. Current: bounded (8 msg), returns QueueFull. Missing: time-based expiry (§2), priority (§3). Fix: add deadline field to queued messages, drop expired on dequeue.
close_reason: Verified: queue bounded (8 msg via heapless::Deque), returns QueueFull on overflow. Sections 1,4,5 compliant. Section 2 (time-based expiry) missing - filed project-LICHEN-t7sl.1 for implementation.
